name: 8"x9" Sketched Branches Wall Art Framed - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring the tranquility of nature into your home with this 8-Inch x 9-Inch Sketched Branches Framed Wall Art from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Crafted with a neutral color palette that complements any décor, this wall art showcases a lithograph print of branches in a brown, wood-like polystyrene frame. The compact size makes it perfect for cozy spaces or adding to a gallery wall, and the sawtooth back allows easy hanging.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
